## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullet points: what changed and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message with scope (`feat(...): ...`,
      `fix(...): ...`, `docs(...): ...`, etc.)
- [ ] Docs updated in the same patch (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Tests added / updated (or N/A — explain)
- [ ] No secrets logged (passphrases, OAuth tokens, decrypted
      profile content, `Authorization` headers, session tokens)
- [ ] No scope creep (no sync / mount / generic file manager /
      share links)
- [ ] CI green
